title: BetterBundle Classic
description: Use bundle to store various original (mod) items
body:
Please ensure that Vault is installed before installing this plugin.

PREVIEW Mod [Download](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterbundle-preview)

![introduction](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6135054d14773a1235d0216de46e8c9090a3a44a.png)

# BetterBundle Classic 
#### Give players a bundle item to store various items
- Players can place the bundle on OffHand and open it
- Supported version 1.12.X - 1.21.X
- Supported server Folia Purpur PaperSpigot Spigot Arclight CatServer Mohist more....
- The plugin runs efficiently and there are no bugs
- OP can query and alter the contents of each bundle
- The bundle contains a Slot_Upgrade function, which can be activated or not during creation
- Supported MySQL or SQLite
- Supported Module items storage
- Bundle contents use Base64 to and compressed using Lz4 compression algorithm to reduce space occupation
- Plugin support the PREVIEW mods to preview bundle contents when select the bundle by cursor

![preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b2df11ea2f8172f85202be78971b0f66bebb4747.png)
